scripts.ready: vp check && vp test && vp run audit:tokens && vp run audit:modern-web-guidance && vp run test:storybook && vp run -r build && vp run validate:packages && vp run check:storybook-deploy
scripts.build:storybook-worker: vp run build-storybook && rm -rf dist/mcp_b_design_system_storybook && vp build --config storybook.worker.vite.config.ts && cp -R packages/react-components/storybook-static/. dist/mcp_b_design_system_storybook
scripts.deploy:storybook: vp run build:storybook-worker && vp exec wrangler deploy --config dist/mcp_b_design_system_storybook/wrangler.json
scripts.check:storybook-deploy: vp run build:storybook-worker && vp exec wrangler deploy --dry-run --config dist/mcp_b_design_system_storybook/wrangler.json
scripts.validate:packages: node scripts/verify-packed-packages.mjs && vp exec publint packages/design-tokens && vp exec publint packages/react-components
scripts.changeset:version: changeset version && vp install --no-frozen-lockfile && vp fmt
